name: Lead Time Distribution
description: Lead time in days for completed work items
query: SELECT full_date AS completed_date, value AS lead_time_days, COALESCE(slice_value, 'all') AS issue_type FROM metrics.v_facts WHERE calc_code = 'lead_time_days' [[ AND project_key = {{project_key}} ]] [[ AND full_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND full_date <= {{date_to}} ]] ORDER BY full_date DESC LIMIT 500
